records.ety: [L. calumnia, fr. calvi to devise tricks, deceive; cf. F. calomnie. Cf. Challenge, n.]

defs: False accusation of a crime or offense, maliciously made or reported, to the injury of another; malicious misrepresentation; slander; detraction.
quotes: Be thou as chaste as ice, as pure as snow, thou shalt not escape calumny.
